status_quo: Readmission rates reported 23% lower than actual. Compliance dashboards built on stale extracts miss discharged-and-returned patients, inflating quality scores and masking care gaps.
with_bayesiq: BayesIQ reconciles EMR discharge events against payer claims in real time. Within two weeks, the governed pipeline surfaced 7 broken metrics across 3 dashboards — giving clinical ops a remediation roadmap before the next CMS audit.
